ddls:
CREATE TABLE "share_issuance" (
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuance event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of issuance (e.g., common stock, preferred stock) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares issued */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of issuance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the issuance */,
  "issue_price" REAL /* Price at which shares were issued */,
  "underwriter" TEXT /* Name of the underwriter for the issuance */,
  "gross_proceeds" REAL /* Total amount raised from the issuance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treasury_stock" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., repurchase, sale) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which shares were purchased */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which shares were sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., stock split, dividend) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares affected by the change */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholder affected by the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the shareholder */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of shares owned by the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shareholder */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number for the shareholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split event */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2-for-1, 3-for-1) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stock split */,
  "new_par_value" REAL /* New par value per share after the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment per share */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dividend payment */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date by which shareholders must own shares to receive the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporate action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of corporate action (e.g., merger, acquisition) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the corporate action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the corporate action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the corporate action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., annual report, quarterly report) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was issued */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the financial report */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed with regulatory authorities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction or change */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction or change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction or change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction or change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the transaction or change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource that the permission applies to (e.g., financial reports, shareholder data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholder_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder position */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholder */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of shares owned by the shareholder */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares owned by the shareholder */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholder_positions_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholder_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder transaction */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholder */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholder_transactions_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)
